title: Auto Planter
description: Add planters that automatically plants Saplings and Seeds
body:
This mod add a block looks like dirt and dispenser.

* The planter allows you to plant Saplings and Seeds automatically on the planter.
* This will support your automation to get Wood materials in not too technical way.

The planter has own inventory, which can be opened by interacting the block. You can put Saplings. After closing GUI, the planter plants Sapling on the top of planter.

Use hoe to this planter to allow to plant Seeds.
